name: Nikki & Nora: The N&N Files
overview: The N&N Files follows New Orleans locals Nikki Beaumont (Liz Vassey) and Nora Delany (Christina Cox) as they juggle the inner-workings of their personal lives with their roles as private investigators in America's oldest party town.

trailers.title: Nikki & Nora: The N&N Files Teaser
